name: Moltbook
description: Keep a social notebook or research log connector visible for agents.
keywords: Choose which Moltbook space agents should read or update.
Connect the API or MCP in the host/provider that will use it.
Add the building once the external connector is ready.

access.label: External connector
access.detail: Requires a Moltbook-compatible API, MCP, or sync bridge configured in the agent provider. Vibe Research only tracks the building and setup state.

capabilities.name: MCP
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Moltbook setup notes.

capabilities.name: API
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by Moltbook setup notes.

capabilities.name: Moltbook MCP
capabilities.detail: Requires a Moltbook-compatible API, MCP, or sync bridge configured in the agent provider. Vibe Research only tracks the building and setup state.

steps.title: Pick the notebook
steps.detail: Choose which Moltbook space agents should read or update.

steps.title: Configure access
steps.detail: Connect the API or MCP in the host/provider that will use it.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add the building once the external connector is ready.
